credentials: PHD 2019 University of Texas at Austin
name: Josiah HANNA

ratings.comment: I took CS 639 autonomous robotics, and the lecture was well-organized, the readings and homework were well-designed, and the total workload was fine. Although there are some complex concepts, he will collect questions before class and answer each one in clear detail.

His lectures would typically consist of robotically reading slides, often without explanation. We would often skip example problems in class to meet the slide quota for the lecture. Unfair regrade policy where you get a -10 even for any justified regrade requests.

Awesome prof. His lectures are very clear and he understands the subject matter well
However, this class is covering too many topics. So, it can't get depth or attractive logical class. Just covering the overall AI.
+Exam is tough

Very robotic delivery in class - used to simply read from the slides. Skipped a lot of examples and explanations for the math part of the class (which was around 70%). Overall, stopped attending class after the first few weeks. Homeworks were relatively easy and could be done in a few hours.
Amazing class just a lot of work.
